transcript.text:
[Tzu-Deok Sun ordering Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake)]
[Who is she and why is she giving me a hard time?]
[The tteokboki spot Deok Sun went to everyday]
[The place from 'Reply 1988'!]
[Tzu-Deok Sun is here]
[I've never seen anyone like her]
[No appetite like hers]
[I'm eating mindlessly]
[Who is she..?]
[I'm taking over this place's tteokboki today]
[I, Tzu-Deok Sun, set a new record here]
[Where is this beautiful place that's greeting us today?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Seosan today
I'm here for the 'Signage Improvement Project'
They are on a project to switch out old panels and signs to the new ones

I'm in front of Haemieupseong Fortress
A pretty old-looking place, but has new signboards
[Seosan is also known to be a famous tourist place!]
[Before & Afters of the replaced signs]
[They're all new]
That one is very cute
Look like an old tailor shop
And the sign is really cute
Smart Tailor Shop
All of these are new too
All cute
[The shop owners are happy too]
The place I'm eating at is a very famous place
A lot of you guys have heard of 'Brazil Tteokboki', right?
It was on the K-drama 'Reply 1988'
[The family's favorite tteokboki restaurant]

[This is Brazil Tteokboki]
This restaurant also received a new signboard through the signage project
Let's check the place out
I've always wanted to try this place
It looked very old before
Now it's all renovated
[Yalgae Bunsik] [Seosan-shi Haemi-myeon]
[The restaurant owner]
[She's very happy about how the place turned out]
Hello
Look who it is!
I've only seen this place on TV
How does it feel to be in Seosan?
It's so pretty over here with tourist attractions
It's a good place to live in
Clean air

The new signs look good, right?
Yes, the streets look neat
Our tteokboki is out of this world
Yes, I've been curious
Seen it a lot on TV
Try it, it's delicious
We borrowed these pots and burners after being told that you were coming
It's our first time doing anything like this
[She will eat at least 10 servings]
We saw that you eat a lot of food
How long has this place been here for?
42 years
That's a long time
I'm the Tteokboki Big Mother
[Autographs from 'Reply 1988' actors and actresses]
[Let's eat]

There's only 1 item on the menu
Just tteokboki and nothing else No side items
How is it served?
2 servings that include everything
How about 5 orders of the 2 servings, so 10 servings?
I borrowed all those portable stoves
[She knew what was coming...]
She's good at eating everything
I will try, just enjoy your meal
Thank you
[Let me show you 42 years of tteokboki ways]
[Bean sprouts?]
The crunchiness from the bean sprouts is nice
[There's a reason why this place is popular]
[Both the son and the mother]
[Putting in work]

How spicy would you like?
About Shin Ramyun spiciness is fine
[Not too spicy for Tzuyang]
Smells delicious
[10 servings of Tteokboki ready!]
-This is 2 servings? -Yeah
The portions are huge
Never made so much for 1 person
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
[All ready to go!]
[This is a first in 42 years]
It's a lot of food in 1 plate
2 people share 1 plate
-Bon appetit -Enjoy
Big portions This much food in 1 plate
Usually comes with 2 boiled eggs, but I asked for 1 on each plate

It has bean sprouts,
dumplings, rice cake, boiled egg, glass noodles, ramyun noodles, fishcake,
A lot of stuff
This is going to be great Tteokboki with noodles is the best
Tasty
Just from the looks of it,
I thought it would taste very homemade
There's no toughness
The sauce is very unique and tasty
The sauce goes so well with the noodles
It has a kick
Very good
A very familiar taste, but it's much better than that
The rice cake is very soft
A very soft flour-made rice cake
A lot of dumplings in here too

It's packed with fillings
Yummy
The sauce is just about right
I was worried that it might be too sweet
It's not sweet
The balance between the sweetness, spiciness, and the flavors are perfect
I can definitely enjoy the sauce until the very end of the meal
That's good
Rice cake with fishcake
Is this made with gochujang? (red chili paste)
Is this red chili paste or soy sauce?
It's a combination of both!
[They did put both]
It's interesting because it looks and tastes like a gochujang tteokboki
And those tend to have a bit of toughness
This is not like that at all!

That's good!
[Break up the dumpling]
With the sauce
The egg too
Can't forget about the eggs
Mix it
Breaking up the egg is the best!
Enjoy~
[All over her shirt again]
[It happens all the time]
I need to wear dark clothes when eating tteokboki
What did I do?
[Complaining]
It's really good
Scrape it all up
The spiciness is at about Shin Ramyun level

[1 plate down]
[Right onto the 2nd]
The noodles are really great
They should package the sauce and sell it as instant noodles
-Enjoy -Yes, thank you
The drinks! Thank you
Breaking it up makes it taste better
Get it on the spoon
This is the best
So good
It's all over my shirt
Drink some of this too
Thank you!
It's all over your shirt because you didn't wear an apron
[Goal!]
[But can't resist good food]

[Boiled eggs with sauce]
[2nd plate down!]
[Come here you!]
My mother was shocked after watching her previous mukbang videos
That's why she's not able to talk to her too much in front of camera
I was shocked
-Really -Yes
This is a record
[We're used to this...]
First in 42 years of history
She's a worldwide celebrity
No no no no no Don't say that
[Listing why she's a worldwide celebrity]
Don't go overboard
Nostalgic flavors
Something I had as a kid

[Gather up the noodles]
[Let's eat everything]
I have to talk in between
[But I'll just eat]
Food like this, You get carried away and eat everything before you know it
Nom nom like this
[Nom noming]
[3rd plate down!]
Next one
It has chewy noodles and the ramyun noodles inside
So the texture is very nice
Now for the boiled egg
Let's break it up with the dumpling here
That's incredible
[It's just me and you]
My shirt's a total mess today

What do I do? How do I go home?
[4th plate down!]
[Is this real life?]
Where did everything go?
Here
May I have some more cider, please?
[2 more cans~]
Thank you
-Thank you -This is a world record
I was walking around Seosan and saw Haemieupseong Fortress
There's also a beach out there with lots of great restaurants near Seosan and Taean
Such a great place for a family trip
The streets are very clean and nice because of the new signboards
-The new signs look good, right? -Yes!
When did you get it changed?
Last year around this time? It went through a lot with me

But I still like the new change
I knew that the portions were huge
I didn't think I'd struggle at all, but
this is a lot more than expected
That's amazing
It's shocking
First time in 40 years she's ever said that
It's my first time seeing anything like that
-Same here -Someone that eats that much
I saved the dumplings for last
1 last boiled egg
[A good-job sticker with 5 stars!]
I'm so thankful that she came by to enjoy our food
Very shocking
I'm speechless
Did you think I was not going to finish everything?

[Had no idea]
Dumbfounded
Thank you for the meal!
I came to Seosan and had some delicious tteokboki today
The Haemieupseong Fortress is here,
The streets and plazas are very nice here
The beach, a lot of eateries, etc It's a great place to come as a family or even as a couple!
Thanks everyone!
[Come to Seosan, where history and modern time coexist!]
[Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
